validation.password_too_short: Your password is too short. Use at least 8 characters.
validation.password_no_special: Add at least one special character (for example !, {'@'}, #, or other punctuation). Letters and numbers alone are not enough.
validation.password_rule_special: At least one special character (symbol or punctuation)
validation.username_invalid_chars: Usernames can only use letters, numbers, and underscores. You can add or skip a leading {'@'}.

posts.title: Title
posts.all_posts_must_have_media_or_text: Each page must have a media or text
posts.post_must_have_media_or_text: Post must have media or text
posts.monetization_no_metadata_hint: Monetization metadata could not be derived (no video or probe failed).
posts.paid_video_interstitial_cost_unknown: Watch this video using coins from your balance.
posts.paid_video_interstitial_availability: Once you unlock it, this video stays available to you for the next 90 days.
posts.paid_video_watch_full_hint: Preview playing. Unlock to watch the full video.
posts.paid_video_unlock_login: Sign in to unlock this video.
posts.media_upload_modal_hint: Please keep this page open until your post is sent.

coins.insufficient_hint: Not enough coins. Add coins to continue.
coins.topup_subtitle: Choose a package. You will be redirected to secure checkout.
coins.topup_load_error: Could not load packages. Try again later.
coins.topup_no_packages: No coin packages are available for purchase right now.
coins.topup_no_web_packages: Packages exist but none are set up for web checkout yet. Add Stripe price IDs in the API seed (SEED_STRIPE_PRICE_*) and run prisma db seed.
coins.success_working_hint: This may take a few seconds.
coins.success_generic_title: Thank you! Your coins are on the way.
coins.success_timeout_hint: Your payment may still be completing. You can try unlocking again or go home.
coins.success_still_processing: Balance not updated yet. Wait a moment and try again.
coins.cancel_hint: No charge was made. You can add coins anytime from your profile.
